title: phyllanthus minutiflorus
intro: Phyllanthus minutiflorus, also known as the small-flowered phyllanthus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus minutiflorus include its ability to protect against liver damage, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
